subject: % of template option and Cube - error in importing file
body:
Hello Dimitry,

I have a question about the parameter % of template for template matching - 
what this actually is and whether it has a similar function as when one 
provides a mask?

I tried to find if there is already an answer to this in the goggle group 
but haven't come across much helpful information.

My second problem and question are about using Cube to visualize tomogram 
and picked particles -- we have installed the Cube on a Windows PC however 
when I try to load the .mrc file reconstructed by warp it starts loading 
the file but then it just goes blank (see attachments).
Do you know what might be the issue?

Thanks a lot for your help in advance.

Best
Katarina
